description: Site footer bottom bar displaying a policy navigation menu and copyright notice.

props.name: links
props.default: [{ label: 'Feedback', href: 'https://www.sheffield.ac.uk/contact/comments' }, { label: 'Privacy', href: 'https://www.sheffield.ac.uk/privacy' }, { label: 'Accessibility', href: 'https://www.sheffield.ac.uk/accessibility' }, { label: 'FOI', href: 'https://www.sheffield.ac.uk/foi' }, { label: 'Modern slavery statement', href: 'https://www.sheffield.ac.uk/procurement/modern-slavery' }]

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard bottom bar with default policy links and copyright

stories.name: CustomLinks
stories.description: Bottom bar with a reduced set of custom links

notes: Content is identical across all 26276 sampled pages — links and copyright text never vary. Props are provided for configurability. The nav has aria-labelledby pointing to a visually-hidden h2 with text 'Footer menu' — hardcode this. The root element also carries the class 'panel'.
htmlExamples:
Footer menu

  • Feedback
  • Privacy
  • Accessibility
  • FOI
  • Modern slavery statement
